families.notes: Straightforward single-destination trips -- intentionally has no hard instances; difficulty comes from the other 6 families.
Tight-budget scenarios likely to trigger budget_revision branches.
Shorter trips, stricter schedule constraints, fewer travelers.
Multi-traveler preference coordination; likely clarification-branch source.
Tour/itinerary-heavy; candidate host for downstream_propagation-style content.
Combines >=2 of budget/schedule/integration constraints by construction -- intentionally has no easy instances.

Not a distinct travel purpose -- attack-free tasks engineered for high normal metadata complexity (Step 6.5-15). Each instance still carries a real task_category (one of the other 6 values) for what the LLM actually sees; hard_normal_trip is a template_family/workload-composition label plus hard_normal_tags, not a TravelRequest field. Additional hard_normal_tags are also sprinkled into instances from OTHER families (target: 10-15 tagged instances total, not confined to this family alone -- see hard_normal_tag_taxonomy.json).
